case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ERVIN ISIDRO MALDONADO PIRIR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERVIN ISIDRO MALDANADO PIRIR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,310.08 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PIRIR, ERVIN ISIDRO MALDONADO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PIRIR, ERVIN ISIDRO MALDONADO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIRIR, ERVIN ISIDRO MALDONADO $1,310.08 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,390.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
